title: The Union Territories (Laws) Act, 1950
full_text: The Union Territories (Laws) Act, 1950 संघ राज्यक्षेत्र (विधि) अधिनियम, 1950 Rules Regulations Notifications Orders Circulars Ordinance Statutes SectionsScheduleAnnexureAppendixFormsActdetails Act ID: 195030 Act Number: 30 Enactment Date: 1950-04-15 Act Year: 1950 Short Title: The Union Territories (Laws) Act, 1950 Hindi Title: संघ राज्यक्षेत्र (विधि) अधिनियम, 1950 Long Title: An Act to provide for the extension of laws to certain Union territories. Ministry: Ministry of Home Affairs Department: Department of States Enforcement Date: 16-04-1950 Schedule 1. THE SCHEDULE Order Appendix Forms TitleFiles TitleFiles TitleFiles The Union Territories (Laws) Act, 1950 Show all section Section 1. Short title and commencement. Show Related Subordinates Section 2. Power to extend enactments to certain Union territories. Show Related Subordinates Section 3. Extension of laws to Tripura, Vindhya Pradesh and Manipur. Show Related Subordinates Section 4. Repeals and Savings. Schedule 1.
